"},"setRoundVotingConfig(bytes32,bytes32,uint256,uint256,uint256)":{"notice":"Spec 004 R10 \u2014 DAO voting config. `strategy` is a keccak256 concept hash (e.g. keccak256(\"sa:VotingStewardQuorum\")). `windowStartsAt` and `windowEndsAt` are unix seconds; pass 0 to mean \"no window\"."}},"notice":"Fund body + Round body in this contract's own typed-attribute         storage (inherited from AttributeStorage). Decoupled. Fund subject = fund's agent address (Fund is an OrganizationAgent). Round subject = keccak256(abi.encodePacked(\"sa:round:\", roundId)) \u2014 rounds are not agents, so a synthetic id keeps them in the same store as their owning fund. Auth: fund mutations require fund.AgentAccount.isOwner(msg.sender); round mutations require the round's fund's AgentAccount.isOwner.","version":1}},"settings":{"compilationTarget":{"src/FundRegistry.sol":"FundRegistry"},"evmVersion":"prague","libraries":{},"metadata":{"bytecodeHash":"ipfs"},"optimizer":{"enabled":true,"runs":200},"remappings":[":@openzeppelin/contracts/=lib/openzeppelin-contracts/contracts/",":account-abstraction/=lib/account-abstraction/contracts/",":erc4626-tests/=lib/openzeppelin-contracts/lib/erc4626-tests/",":forge-std/=lib/forge-std/src/",":halmos-cheatcodes/=lib/openzeppelin-contracts/lib/halmos-cheatcodes/src/",":openzeppelin-contracts/=lib/openzeppelin-contracts/"],"viaIR":true},"sources":{"src/AttributeStorage.sol":{"keccak256":"0x7341a522a1028951103aea6651a99114d50aab0f9fe8ab0cef67a55530224f34","license":"MIT","urls":["bzz-raw://84ef067ef1094b436bcfdfa1a2c4d9594799bd5c01eb889db40720eac71002f2","dweb:/ipfs/QmPoHx6mWjiJut6DLgJvfXc7TUVL91bHzp3qYyxUNCo6KR"]},"src/FundRegistry.sol":{"keccak256":"0xaec63ce78b44b4ef0b04ccefc746f924794262d86d7beeffdc08ad6b98205704","license":"MIT","urls":["bzz-raw://31c92bdf577636c3c5da6f3b49ee9caa8449f846b28ebcdcd6ed6ab0e69277d1","dweb:/ipfs/QmU3WAEqi1J2b5FNXkYzrwJog9nd2zUc7oX6EUovAEnMpc"]},"src/OntologyTermRegistry.sol":{"keccak256":"0x0cd6011124337410a2aac87ccbbeac634a8a14e85e4f4d10e8d49836325bea9c","license":"MIT","urls":["bzz-raw://583303d503ff402b433da8a7f89592b927066ee82e978217663476fdb2a2566c","dweb:/ipfs/QmVjSUx2LYZsZrZ9xAotkQpFkw7yB7Gnw9BzScZzW2mYjz"]},"src/ShapeRegistry.sol":{"keccak256":"0xd46ce253774daf9378599d57cd76173dd96195d56362bfef5df0f9f65afdb71f","license":"MIT","urls":["bzz-raw://f1664e76045c1d9317c8e21df6d65bb557eaa2159bc604dafd174996ea30b318","dweb:/ipfs/QmXUFyDfwG1vAh2x6U2d2gVcna65ezPmgJughf8E5pNvmE"]}},"version":1}

SA_ROUND_POOL_AGENT().notice: Optional: pool that operates this round. Lets the on-chain → GraphDB  sync emit `sa:operatedByPool` so the UI can render the round↔pool  link without relying on the fragile `fundAgent == pool.stewardshipAgent`  inference. Legacy rounds opened before this field existed simply  omit it.

SA_ROUND_SLUG().notice: Original off-chain slug (e.g. "demo-trauma-care-q2"). Needed by the  on-chain → GraphDB sync to construct urn:smart-agent:round:<slug>  IRIs without consulting any off-chain index.

SA_ROUND_VOTING_STRATEGY().notice: Spec 004 R10 — DAO voting config moved on chain. Replaces the org-mcp `rounds` SQL table (now dropped). Set lazily via `setRoundVotingConfig`; the openRound flow continues to write the canonical body without requiring a voting config (default applies when unset: strategy = sa:VotingStewardQuorum, threshold = 2, no window).

getRoundVotingConfig(bytes32).notice: Spec 004 R10 — read voting config. Returns zero values when unset (callers default: strategy = sa:VotingStewardQuorum, threshold = 2, no window). The org-mcp `vote:tally_for_round` tool falls back to these defaults when any field is zero.

setRoundPoolAgent(bytes32,address).notice: Retro-assign or change the pool that operates a round. Useful for  legacy rounds that predate the `poolAgent` field.

setRoundVotingConfig(bytes32,bytes32,uin.notice: Spec 004 R10 — DAO voting config. `strategy` is a keccak256 concept hash (e.g. keccak256("sa:VotingStewardQuorum")). `windowStartsAt` and `windowEndsAt` are unix seconds; pass 0 to mean "no window".
